policy_claims.description: All production deployments require explicit approval
policy_claims.testable_assertion: Every deployment event has a corresponding approval record

policy_claims.description: No service account shall have persistent admin access
policy_claims.testable_assertion: Service accounts with admin role have TTL <= 24 hours

policy_claims.description: PII access logging must cover >= 99% of access events
policy_claims.testable_assertion: PII access events with audit log entry / total PII access events >= 0.99

policy_claims.description: All security incidents must have response within 4 hours
policy_claims.testable_assertion: Time from incident detection to first response <= 4 hours

policy_claims.description: AI model outputs must be logged before delivery to end users
policy_claims.testable_assertion: Every model inference has a log entry with timestamp before response delivery
